scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: Retenzy is an all-in-one retention platform founded in 2023, designed specifically to help Shopify e-commerce brands maximize Customer Lifetime Value.
scenes.visual: A digital dashboard showing rewards, referrals, and reviews integrated on a Shopify storefront.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. Educational Illustration. Designed for College Students, 16:9 composition. Scene 1: A digital dashboard showing rewards, referrals, and reviews integrated on a Shopify storefront.. Narration context: "Retenzy is an all-in-one retention platform founded in 2023, designed specifically to help Shopify e-commerce brands maximize Customer Lifetime Value."

scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: Through gamified loyalty programs and VIP tiers, brands can create points-based economies and offer exclusive perks that encourage repeat purchases.
scenes.visual: A smartphone displaying a points balance, milestone goals, and unlocked membership rewards.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. Educational Illustration. Designed for College Students, 16:9 composition. Scene 2: A smartphone displaying a points balance, milestone goals, and unlocked membership rewards.. Narration context: "Through gamified loyalty programs and VIP tiers, brands can create points-based economies and offer exclusive perks that encourage repeat purchases."

scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: Retenzy automates social proof by gathering text, photo, and video reviews, then syncing them with Google Shopping to boost search engine optimization.
scenes.visual: An automated review request email turning into a gold star rating on Google.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. Educational Illustration. Designed for College Students, 16:9 composition. Scene 3: An automated review request email turning into a gold star rating on Google.. Narration context: "Retenzy automates social proof by gathering text, photo, and video reviews, then syncing them with Google Shopping to boost search engine optimization."

scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: With over fifteen pre-built storefront widgets, e-commerce stores can deploy these complex loyalty systems instantly, without writing a single line of code.
scenes.visual: A drag-and-drop interface showing code-free widget installation onto an online store.
scenes.imagePrompt: No humans. Educational Illustration. Designed for College Students, 16:9 composition. Scene 4: A drag-and-drop interface showing code-free widget installation onto an online store.. scenes.title: Retenzy Customer Retention Platform
scenes.narration: By combining loyalty programs with automated email marketing flows for cart recovery and post-purchase follow-ups, Retenzy nurtures long-term customer advocacy.
scenes.visual: A flowchart connecting email automation triggers to an increasing customer retention curve graph.
